review_text: Loved it for two weeks then the main zipper split and won't close. Really disappointed for the price.
Zipper broke on the third use. Same story as other reviewers apparently. Returning it.
Warm and light. Runs small though — order a size up. The zipper feels a bit flimsy honestly.
Great fabric but the zipper pull came off in my hand. Second jacket from this brand with a zipper issue.
Fantastic on a cold hike. Fits true if anything slightly snug. No complaints yet.
Zipper jammed and then tore off after a month. For $180 this is unacceptable.
Decent jacket. Sizing runs small, I'm normally a medium and the medium was tight.
Keeps water cold for 24 hours easily. Best bottle I've owned.
The lid leaks if you lay it sideways in a bag. Soaked my laptop bag. Insulation is great though.
Love the insulation but the lid seal leaks. Came home to a wet backpack twice now.
Solid bottle, keeps drinks cold. Wish the lid didn't drip a little around the threads.
Amazing. Ice still there after a full work day. Highly recommend.
Good but the lid leaked in my gym bag. Might just be my unit.
Bright and easy to install. Look great along the path.
Stopped working after the first heavy rain. Supposedly waterproof but clearly not.
Three of the six lights died after a rainstorm. Water got inside the casing.
Charge well and look beautiful at night. No issues so far in dry weather.
Rain killed them within two weeks. Water seeped into the battery compartment. Not waterproof at all.
Nice warm glow, but I now bring them in when it rains after reading other reviews.
Incredibly soft and warm. Fits perfectly. My new favorite sweater.
Shrank a full size in the wash even on cold. Wish the care instructions were clearer.
Beautiful sweater. Hand wash only or it shrinks — learned that the hard way but my fault.
Great quality merino, no itch, true to size. Would buy again.
Lovely until I washed it and it shrank. Would be 5 stars if it were machine washable.
Perfect fit and so cozy. Just follow the wash instructions and you're fine.
